description:
Replace Bootstrap with Tailwind CSS

Remove Bootstrap dependency and replace all Bootstrap styling with Tailwind CSS utility classes throughout the application.

Requirements:
- Remove Bootstrap from package dependencies and import statements
- Install and configure Tailwind CSS with appropriate configuration file
- Convert all Bootstrap component classes to Tailwind equivalents (buttons, forms, cards, modals, etc.)
- Replace Bootstrap grid system with Tailwind's flexbox/grid utilities
- Convert Bootstrap responsive breakpoints to Tailwind's responsive modifiers
- Replace Bootstrap JavaScript components (modals, dropdowns, tooltips) with headless UI libraries or custom implementations
- Ensure all existing UI functionality remains intact after migration
- Verify responsive behavior across all breakpoints
- Update any custom CSS that relies on Bootstrap variables or mixins
- Test all pages and components for visual consistency and proper styling
- Remove any unused CSS and optimize bundle size
title: Migrate from Bootstrap to Tailwind CSS
